_comment: Khora telemetry public surface contract. See telemetry-contract.md. Items tagged stability=public must not break without a major version bump. Keep this file in sync with the codebase — tests/unit/telemetry/test_contract.py acts as the drift gate.

instrumentation_scope.name: khora
instrumentation_scope._comment: Every span and metric carries scope=khora + version=khora package version. service.name belongs to the host application — khora never sets it.

resource_attributes.name: khora.telemetry.contract.version
resource_attributes._comment: Stable across khora patch releases. Bump alongside the contract version. Lets dashboards filter by telemetry-schema version independently of khora's package version.

backends._comment: Precedence order applied by khora.telemetry.configure_telemetry(). First match wins.
precedence: backend='logfire' or (auto + LOGFIRE_TOKEN/LOGFIRE_SEND_TO_LOGFIRE env + logfire importable)
backend='otel' or (auto + any OTEL_* env var set)

spans.name: khora.ingest.chunk_temporal_attribution
spans._comment: Wraps temporal-chunk construction in ingest._store_chunks. Attributes: chunk_count (int), occurred_at_source ('metadata'|'ingest_fallback'), source_type (bounded enum from SourceSystem + 'unknown'). Issue #568 Phase B.

spans.name: khora.vectorcypher.ppr_retrieve
spans._comment: Wraps the query-time Personalized PageRank retrieval path (Issue #542 — HippoRAG 2). Attributes: namespace_id (str), entry_count (int), entity_count (int, only set when graph non-empty), edge_count (int), chunk_count (int), fallback_reason (one of 'no_entry_entities'|'empty_entity_graph'|'no_seed_overlap', set only when the path degrades to vector-only).

spans.name: khora.vectorcypher.recency_channel
spans._comment: Wraps the parallel recency-channel SQL + cosine-relevance filter (Issue #567 A3). Attributes: namespace_id (str), limit (int), raw_count (int — chunks returned by ORDER BY occurred_at DESC), filtered_count (int — survivors after the temporal_query_relevance_floor gate).

spans.name: khora.vectorcypher.recency_floor_synthesis
spans._comment: Wraps the synthetic RECENCY/CHANGE date-floor decision in retriever.py. Attributes (set by the retriever, not validated by the drift gate): synthetic_temporal_filter_applied (bool), anti_recency_veto (bool), temporal_floor_days (int|None), recency_channel_fired (bool), recency_reference_mode (str: 'wall_clock'|'corpus_max'). Issue #567 Phase A.

spans.name: khora.dream.run
spans._comment: Top-level dream run span. Attributes: run_id (str), namespace_id (str — span attr ONLY, never a metric label), mode ('dry-run'|'apply'), trigger (str). Issue #666 part of #649.

spans.name: khora.dream.phase
spans._comment: Per-phase span (audit / mutation / ...). Attributes: run_id (str), namespace_id (str — span attr only), phase (str). Issue #666.

spans.name: khora.dream.llm_call
spans._comment: Wraps each LLM call inside a dream phase (borderline-merge verifier, second-opinion auditor). Attributes: model, direction. Free-text prompts go through bounded_text_hash before becoming attributes. Issue #666.

spans.name: khora.dream.undo
spans._comment: Wraps the invocation of an UndoHandle. Attributes: op_type, outcome. Issue #666.

spans.name: khora.dream.op
spans._comment: Per-op span (DreamOperationEvent). Inner-loop, internal stability. Attributes: run_id, op_id, namespace_id (span attr only), phase, op_type, decision, strategy, rationale_hash (bounded_text_hash). Issue #666.

spans.name: khora.dream.entity_merge
spans._comment: Inner span for the entity-merge op kind. Issue #666.

spans.name: khora.dream.edge_prune
spans._comment: Inner span for the edge-prune op kind. Issue #666.

spans.name: khora.dream.community_summary
spans._comment: Inner span for the community-summary op kind (Phase 5+). Issue #666.

spans.name: khora.dream.vectorcypher.schema_drift
spans._comment: Inner span for the vectorcypher schema-drift audit op (OpKind.VECTORCYPHER_SCHEMA_DRIFT_REPORT). Attributes: run_id, namespace_id (span attr only — never a metric label), entity_total (int), relationship_total (int), new_entity_types_count (int), unused_entity_types_count (int), entity_frequency_delta_count (int), new_relationship_types_count (int), unused_relationship_types_count (int), relationship_frequency_delta_count (int). Raw type-name strings never become metric labels per the bounded-cardinality rule. Issue #655 part of #649.

spans.name: khora.dream.chronicle.abstention_drift
spans._comment: Per-op span for the chronicle abstention-threshold drift report (read-only audit). Attributes: namespace_id (span attr only), decision ('recommend'|'insufficient_data'), direction ('lower'|'raise'|'calibrated'; only when decision=='recommend'), sample_count, top_score_p90, combined_score_p90, rationale_hash (bounded_text_hash). Issue #652 part of #649.

spans.name: khora.dream.vectorcypher.orphan_report
spans._comment: PageRank-based orphan-entity report (#657, Phase 1.4). Attributes: run_id, op_id, namespace_id (span attr only — never a metric label per cardinality rule), phase, total_entities, candidate_count, p5_combined_score, weighting_used. Read-only audit; zero mutations, zero LLM calls.

spans.name: khora.dream.chronicle.tombstone_audit
spans._comment: Inner span for the chronicle memory_facts tombstone-audit op (#654, Phase 1.2 of #649). Read-only; attributes: namespace_id (span attr only, never a metric label). The op records active/inactive/invalidated counts, tombstone_ratio, and p50/p90/oldest age in days on the DreamOp outputs.

spans.name: khora.dream.chronicle.fact_compaction
spans._comment: Inner span for the chronicle memory_facts compaction planner (#664, Phase 2.4 of #649). Dry-run only in v0.14 — emits one planned DreamOp per row that would be hard-deleted (the only Phase 2 op that hard-deletes, because the tombstone is itself the soft-delete marker). Apply mode raises NotImplementedError until v0.15 (#669). Attributes: namespace_id (span attr only, never a metric label), retention_days.

spans.name: khora.dream.vectorcypher.source_chunk_ids_gc
spans._comment: Inner span for the vectorcypher source_chunk_ids GC op (OpKind.VECTORCYPHER_SOURCE_CHUNK_IDS_GC, #662, Phase 2.3 of #649). Dry-run only in v0.14 — apply lands v0.15 via reset_entity_source_chunk_ids_batch. Plans per-entity rewrites that drop dead chunk UUIDs from Entity.source_chunk_ids. Attributes: namespace_id (span attr only, never a metric label per cardinality rule), candidate_count, min_dead, mode. Read-only at the SQL boundary; zero LLM calls.

spans.name: khora.dream.vectorcypher.centroid_recompute
spans._comment: Inner span for the vectorcypher centroid-recompute op (OpKind.VECTORCYPHER_CENTROID_RECOMPUTE, #660, Phase 2.2 of #649). Plans the post-merge canonical embedding for each merge cluster — no writes in v0.14 (apply mode raises NotImplementedError). Attributes: op_id, namespace_id (span attr only, never a metric label per the bounded-cardinality rule), phase, cluster_size, min_pairwise_cosine, max_pairwise_lev, decision ('centroid'|'re_embed'|'skip_multimodal'|'skip_singleton').

spans.name: khora.dream.vectorcypher.dedupe_entities
spans._comment: Inner span for the vectorcypher cross-batch entity-resolution dedupe op (OpKind.VECTORCYPHER_DEDUPE_ENTITIES, #658 Phase 2.1 of #649). Dry-run-only in v0.14; apply mode raises NotImplementedError. Attributes: run_id, op_id, namespace_id (span attr only — never a metric label per cardinality rule), phase, total_entities, total_buckets, planned_count, skip_collision_count, default_threshold. Pure planning op — zero writes, zero LLM calls.

spans.name: khora.dream.vectorcypher.prune_edges
spans._comment: Inner span for the vectorcypher edge-pruning op (OpKind.VECTORCYPHER_PRUNE_EDGES, #671, Phase 5.2 of #649). Soft-deletes low-confidence orphan relationship edges via bi-temporal valid_to stamp. OFF by default behind DreamConfig.prune_edges_enabled. Predicate: confidence < threshold (default 0.4) AND valid_to IS NULL AND all source chunks deleted. Default target_predicates is ['ASSOCIATED_WITH'] only — broader pruning is opt-in. Attributes: namespace_id (span attr only, never a metric label per cardinality rule), phase, threshold (float), target_predicates_count (int), candidate_count (int). Pure SELECT + UPDATE; zero LLM calls.

spans.name: khora.dream.chronicle.event_clustering
spans._comment: Inner span for the chronicle_events near-duplicate clustering op (#665, Phase 2.5 of #649). Dry-run only in v0.14; apply lands in v0.15 (#669). Attributes: namespace_id (span attr only, never a metric label), threshold (float, cosine cutoff), window_days (int, referenced_date window half-width), event_count (int, total rows considered). Plan never proposes mutating chronicle_events.chunk_id — that FK powers the temporal recall channel back-pointer.

spans.name: khora.dream.vectorcypher.community_summary
spans._comment: Inner span for the vectorcypher community-detection + LLM summary op (OpKind.VECTORCYPHER_COMMUNITY_SUMMARY, #670, Phase 5.1 of #649). First LLM-using dream op. Planner attributes: op_id, namespace_id (span attr only, never a metric label), phase=audit, total_entities, weighting_used (float, ASSOCIATED_WITH down-weight), community_count, duration_ms. Apply attributes: op_id, namespace_id (span attr only), phase=mutation, community_size, community_id_hash (bounded_text_hash), prompt_hash (bounded_text_hash), kept_claims, dropped_claims, decision ('persisted'|'noop_replay'|'no_grounded_claims'). LLM cost is recorded via khora.dream.llm.tokens through the acompletion wrapper (_telemetry_op='dream_community_summary'). The op is default-OFF behind DreamConfig.community_summary_enabled.

spans.name: khora.dream.vectorcypher.contradiction_detect
spans._comment: Inner span for the vectorcypher contradiction-detection op (OpKind.VECTORCYPHER_CONTRADICTION_DETECT, #672, Phase 5.3 of #649). Report only — never mutates `relationships`; findings persist to the `dream_conflicts` table (migration 035) for human triage and Phase 5.4 (#673) mapping recommendations. Attributes: run_id, op_id, namespace_id (span attr only, never a metric label per cardinality rule), phase, similarity_threshold, total_relationships, live_relationships, finding_count, duration_ms, and per-finding `finding_<i>_desc_a_hash` / `finding_<i>_desc_b_hash` / `finding_<i>_reason` / `finding_<i>_similarity`. Description hashes go through bounded_text_hash — raw text never lands on the span.

spans.name: khora.dream.vectorcypher.normalize_schema
spans._comment: Inner span for the vectorcypher schema-drift normalization op (OpKind.VECTORCYPHER_NORMALIZE_SCHEMA, #673, Phase 5.4 of #649). Operator-driven rename of entity_type / relationship_type values per DreamConfig.normalize_schema_mapping; never auto-derives. Attributes: namespace_id (span attr only, never a metric label per cardinality rule), mapping_size (int, number of old_type -> new_type rules), entity_rename_count (int), relationship_rename_count (int). Apply path emits one MemoryEvent (ENTITY_UPDATED / RELATIONSHIP_UPDATED) per renamed row via coordinator.dispatch_hook. Type renames touch the consumer contract (khora-cli, khora-explorer) — coordinated release required.

spans.name: khora.dream.undo.write
spans._comment: Wraps each fsync'd write of {run_id}.undo.json by DreamFileSink.write_undo_incremental (#667, Phase 4 of #649). Attributes: run_id (str), namespace_id (str — span attr only, never a metric label per cardinality rule), record_count (str). The orchestrator's apply-phase loop fires this after every committed op so a mid-run crash leaves a recoverable undo file on disk.

metrics.name: khora.query.temporal.floor_applied_total
metrics.description: Number of times a synthetic RECENCY/CHANGE temporal filter was applied to a query.

labels.name: vetoed
labels._comment: True when an anti-recency token suppressed the floor.

metrics._comment: Issue #567 Phase A. NO namespace_id label — cardinality rule.

metrics.name: khora.query.temporal.recency_channel_fired_total
metrics.description: Number of times the parallel recency channel was queried.
metrics._comment: Issue #567 Phase A. NO namespace_id label.

metrics.name: khora.recall.recency.query_to_top1_age_days
metrics.description: Age in days of the top-1 chunk in a recall result.
metrics._comment: Issue #567 Phase A. Log-bucketed: hour-day-week-month-quarter-year-decade. No labels — global recency-skew signal.

metrics.name: khora.ingest.source_timestamp.fallback_count
metrics.description: Number of chunks whose occurred_at fell back to ingest time because the connector did not populate metadata.custom with a timestamp field. Labels: source_type (bounded enum).

labels.name: source_type
labels._comment: Bounded enum drawn from SourceSystem; off-enum values bucket to 'unknown'.

metrics._comment: Issue #568 Phase B. NO namespace_id label — cardinality rule.

metrics.name: khora.hooks.llm.evaluations_total
metrics.description: Level 2 (nano-LLM yes/no) hook filter evaluations, bucketed by outcome.

labels.name: category
labels._comment: match/no_match = LLM decided; timeout = LLM raised or response unparseable; budget_exceeded = per-namespace cap hit, evaluator failed open.

metrics._comment: Issue #576 Phase 1, Item 7. NO namespace_id label — cardinality rule. Default-off feature; counter only fires when KHORA_HOOKS_LLM_EVALUATION_ENABLED=true.

metrics.name: khora.hooks.llm.tokens_total
metrics.description: Approximate token spend for Level 2 hook evaluations, by direction. Char/4 estimate — the canonical token count lives on khora.llm.tokens via the central LLMUsage path.
metrics._comment: Issue #576 Phase 1, Item 7. NO namespace_id label — cardinality rule.

metrics.name: khora.hooks.llm.throttled_total
metrics.description: Number of Level 2 hook evaluations refused by either the per-namespace or per-subscription hourly token budget. Each throttle event corresponds to a fail-open outcome on the affected batch.
metrics._comment: Issue #576 Phase 1, Item 7. Extended in #601 with the per-subscription budget. NO namespace_id label — cardinality rule.

metrics.name: khora.hooks.llm.cache_hits_total
metrics.description: Level 2 hook evaluations short-circuited by the (filter, event_summary_hash) cache.
metrics._comment: Issue #601. NO namespace_id label — cardinality rule.

metrics.name: khora.hooks.llm.cache_misses_total
metrics.description: Level 2 hook evaluations that fell through the cache and required (or queued) an LLM call.
metrics._comment: Issue #601. NO namespace_id label — cardinality rule.

metrics.name: khora.dream.runs_total
metrics.description: Dream runs completed, bucketed by trigger + outcome.
metrics._comment: Issue #666. NO namespace_id label — cardinality rule.

metrics.name: khora.dream.run.duration
metrics.description: End-to-end dream run duration in seconds.
metrics._comment: Issue #666. NO namespace_id label — cardinality rule.

metrics.name: khora.dream.phase.duration
metrics.description: Per-phase duration inside a dream run.

labels.name: phase
labels._comment: Bounded enum of dream phases (audit / mutation / ...).

metrics._comment: Issue #666. NO namespace_id label — cardinality rule.

metrics.name: khora.dream.ops_total
metrics.description: Dream ops decided, by phase / op_type / decision.

labels.name: op_type
labels._comment: Bounded by OpKind plus future additions.

metrics._comment: Issue #666. NO namespace_id label — cardinality rule.

metrics.name: khora.dream.op.duration
metrics.description: Per-op duration. Internal — phase-level histogram is the public surface.
metrics._comment: Issue #666. NO namespace_id label — cardinality rule.

metrics.name: khora.dream.llm.tokens
metrics.description: LLM tokens spent inside a dream run, by direction + model. Distinct from khora.llm.tokens so dream cost can be sliced separately.
metrics._comment: Issue #666. NO namespace_id label — cardinality rule.

metrics.name: khora.dream.undo_invocations_total
metrics.description: Number of UndoHandle invocations, by op_type + outcome.
metrics._comment: Issue #666. NO namespace_id label — cardinality rule.

metrics.name: khora.dream.subscription.overflow_total
metrics.description: Dream event-sink outbox drops (queue full, drop_oldest policy).
metrics._comment: Issue #666. NO namespace_id label — cardinality rule.

metrics.name: khora.dream.report.write_failures_total
metrics.description: File-sink writes that failed (open / write / rename / manifest / summary / undo).
metrics._comment: Issue #666. NO namespace_id label — cardinality rule.
